title: Add Product Variant
description: Add a new variant type (size, color, etc.) to the product catalog.
steps: Add variant type to Product model variant types enum
Create variant attributes schema (e.g., size: S/M/L/XL)
Update product-service to handle variants in create/update
Each variant gets: own SKU, price override (optional), stock count
Update product-controller to include variants in response
Update search indexing to include variant attributes
Update inventory-service to track stock per variant
Add tests for variant CRUD and search
